clauses.template: I, {{owner_name}}, born on {{owner_dob}}, being of sound mind and memory, hereby make, publish and declare this to be my last will and testament, revoking all former wills and codicils made by me.
I hereby revoke all prior wills, codicils and testamentary writings made by me at any time before the date of this will.
I declare that I am governed by Hindu personal law for the purposes of testamentary succession, and I exercise my testamentary freedom to bequeath my self-acquired property as set out herein.
I declare that I am governed by Christian personal law for the purposes of testamentary succession, and I exercise my testamentary freedom to bequeath my property as set out herein.
I declare that I am governed by Parsi personal law for the purposes of testamentary succession, and I exercise my testamentary freedom to bequeath my property as set out herein.

I declare that I am governed by Muslim personal law. I understand that testamentary bequests to non-heirs are limited to one-third of my net estate after debts and funeral expenses. The bequests in this will do not exceed that limit.
I give and bequeath to {{beneficiary_name}} the following assets: {{asset_summary}}.
I give, devise and bequeath the residue of my estate, after payment of debts, funeral expenses and the specific bequests above, to {{beneficiary_name}} in the proportion of {{residue_pct}} percent.
I appoint {{executor_name}} as the sole executor of this will, with full power to administer my estate, collect assets, pay debts and distribute the estate according to this will.
I direct my executor to follow the digital asset instructions recorded in my Banyan asset registry, including: {{digital_instructions}}.
